narrative:
Precinct N. Ridgeville 1-D (precinct in Lorain County) has 1,157 registered voters, with 55.4% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 23.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 20.7%, a modest Republican lean of 3.3 percentage points.
